Home / Services / Fence Staining

Fence Staining

Extend the life of your fence with our professional fence staining services.

A well-maintained fence not only enhances your property's curb appeal but also provides security and privacy. Our fence staining service protects your fence from the harsh California sun, moisture, and insect damage. We begin by power washing the fence to remove dirt, mildew, and loose paint. Then, we apply a high-quality stain that penetrates the wood, providing long-lasting protection and a beautiful finish. We offer a variety of stain colors and opacity levels to suit your desired look. Whether you have a redwood, cedar, or pine fence, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results. Serving the entire South Bay.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Power wash the fence to remove dirt, mildew, and loose paint.
  2. 02 Step 2: Repair any damaged or broken fence boards.
  3. 03 Step 3: Apply a high-quality wood stain, chosen for its durability and weather resistance.
  4. 04 Step 4: Allow the stain to dry properly for maximum protection.

Benefits

  • Increased fence lifespan
  • Enhanced curb appeal
  • Protection from weather and pests
  • Improved property value

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does fence staining take?

The duration depends on the size and condition of the fence, but most fence staining projects can be completed in 1-2 days.

What type of stain is best for my fence?

The best type of stain depends on the type of wood, your desired look, and the level of protection you need. We can help you choose the right stain for your specific fence.

Do you offer any warranty on your fence staining services?

Yes, we offer a warranty on our workmanship and the quality of the stain we use. Contact us for more details.

Get a Free Estimate
